Eurocrypt 2026

10-14 May 2026

Rome, Italy

  • Home
  • Technical program
    Main program Accepted papers Affiliated events Rump session
    Call for artifacts Call for papers AI tool policy Paper submission
  • Attend
    Registration Venue & travel Accommodations Tourism Student stipends Visas Code of conduct
  • Sponsors
  • Contact

Eurocrypt 2026 will take place in Rome, Italy on 10-14 May 2026. Eurocrypt 2026 is organized by the International Association for Cryptologic Research (IACR).

Register now

Be aware that there have been some hotel booking scams targeting authors and potential attendees. Such emails may use IACR logos to appear as legitimate businesses. Do not engage with parties emailing you to confirm your travel plans unless you have booked with that company. Check return email addresses carefully.

Important dates

2 Oct 2025

Submission deadline at 23:59 AoE (anywhere on Earth)

6 Dec 2025

Affiliated events submission deadline at 23:59 AoE (anywhere on Earth)

8 Dec 2025

Rebuttal period begins

12 Dec 2025

Rebuttal period ends

29 Jan 2026

Final notification

17 Feb 2026

Student stipend request deadline

10 May 2026

Conference begins

Website updates

8 May 2026

The affiliated events schedule has been updated

5 May 2026

Rump session submissions are officially open

30 Apr 2026

Just announced: two museums (the Archaeological Museum and the Museum of Musical Instruments) at the conference venue will have free admission for conference attendees. The venue page has more information.

25 Apr 2026

Make us laugh at the rump session, we dare you 😎

31 Mar 2026

Registration is officially open! Late registration is 18 April and incurs an additional fee. The program is also online.

10 Mar 2026

The list of accepted papers is available

19 Feb 2026

There is a call for artifacts up now

28 Jan 2026

If you are interested in student stipend opportunities, that information is now available, along with the code of conduct. Please note that the code of conduct applies to everyone who plans to attend the conference.

15 Jan 2026

The list of affiliated events is available.

24 Sep 2025

The submission server is now open. There is important information regarding submitting a paper on both the call for papers and the paper submission page.

19 Aug 2025

Information about accommodations in Rome has been added

23 Jul 2025

The paper submission page has been added, with additional details about paper and formatting requirements. There is also a call for affiliated events and general information about about the affiliated events.

11 Jul 2025

More information about the venue itself (Parco della Musica Ennio Morricone), including the gardens and museums nearby, has been added

20 Jun 2025

The call for papers is now available, as well as information about visas, tourism, and traveling to the venue. Additionally, please note that the important dates have been updated (see left/above).

22 May 2025

Website launched

Eurocrypt 2026
